items.description: Lucid Motors found itself in a tough bind this week, fending off bankruptcy rumors and watching its stock price plunge as a result. The company quickly denied the report, calling it "completely false" and pointing to its available free cash flow as evidence that it has enough runway to operate into ...

items.title: Daylight saving time is a step closer to becoming permanent in the US
items.description: The US is getting closer to observing daylight saving time year-round. On Tuesday, the House advanced the Sunshine Protection Act on a 308 to 117 vote, which would turn clocks one hour ahead permanently, as reported by CBS News. President Donald Trump wrote on Truth Social in May that the bill would...

items.title: OpenAI finally launches hardware… for Codex
items.description: OpenAI is finally releasing some hardware. No, it isn't the mysterious AI-powered device the company is developing with former Apple designer Jony Ive, a project already tangled up in a messy lawsuit. Instead, it's a product designed to be used with its coding platform, Codex. The device, a square-s...

items.title: 8BitDo’s FlipPad is the most pocketable way to turn your phone into a Game Boy
items.description: The FlipPad draws all the power it needs from your phone’s charging port. Both 8BitDo and GameSir announced tiny gamepads designed to turn smartphones into Game Boy-inspired handhelds at CES 2026. items.title: The tiniest MMO
